converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State Wine Grape Growers records
New York State Wine Grape Growers
6714
4 cubic feet. 4 cubic feet.
1965-1991. Correspondence, Financial Records, Printed Materials, Research Materials Records document the activities of the organization. Other items include, member files, grape prices, news items, legislation that pertains to the wine and grape, correspondence with legislators, marketing, Vinefresh, annual meeting items, press releases, and newsletters. Also included are the files of Monty Stamp as secretary to the organization these have meeting minutes, financial information, copies of mailings from the organization. Collection material in English 6067549
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Evan Fay Earle
Date completed:
July 2007
EAD encoding:
Evan Fay Earle, July 2007
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, August 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
New York Wine Grape Growers mission is to benefit in any way possible members and the New York grape industry.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records document the activities of the organization. Other items include, member files, grape prices, news items, legislation that pertains to the wine and grape, correspondence with legislators, marketing, Vinefresh, annual meeting items, press releases, and newsletters. Also included are the files of Monty Stamp as secretary to the organization these have meeting minutes, financial information, copies of mailings from the organization.
RELATED MATERIALS
See also collection #6695 Box 4 for some oversize items from NYWGG including advertising proofs for NY wine and grape campaigns.
See also Cornell Cooperative Extension Finger Lakes Grape Program records, #6773.
Forms part of the Eastern Wine and Grape Archive. (EWGA)
Cite As:
New York State Wine Grape Growers records, #6714. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Wine and wine making -- New York (State). Viticulturists. Liquor laws -- New York (State) Grapes. Grape juice -- United States. Grape juice industry -- New York (State) Grape industry -- New York (State). Stamp, Monty. Trezise, Jim. New York Wine & Grape Foundation
